narrative: Pre-shift exam conducted by certified examiner Hatfield, completed 0445 (shift begins 0700, well within 3-hour window). Methane test at face B-2 0.2%, intake 0.1%, return 0.4%; all below 1.0%. Oxygen 20.8% at all stations (well above 19.5%). Ventilation quantity 14,500 cfm at last open crosscut (above plan minimum), direction confirmed by smoke tube as inby. Roof, rib, and face conditions inspected — no loose roof, no hazardous ribs noted, face cleaned of debris. No hazardous conditions identified; nothing dangered off. Exam record entered in pre-shift book in lamp house before any miner entered the section. On-coming shift foreman briefed in person + signed.
